events.title: Confirming test inventory
events.summary: Checking that structured test cases and steps exist in the knowledge base.

technical.command: PGPASSWORD=ingestion /opt/homebrew/bin/psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U ingestion -d ingestion -tAc "select 'cases=' || count(*) from test_cases; select 'steps=' || count(*) from test_case_steps;"
